Class UserProfile

java.lang.Object
Auth.UserProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UserProfile extends Object implements Serializable
Stores the display preferences and profile information for a user.

Each UserProfile is linked to a User via userID. It holds settings such as preferred currency, language, and display name. Implements Serializable to allow persistence via DataManager.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • UserProfile

      public UserProfile(int userID, String displayName)
      Constructs a new UserProfile with default settings.

      Defaults: currency = "EGP", language = "English", profilePicture = "".

      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the associated user
      displayName - the initial display name

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(String displayName, String currency, String language)
      Updates profile fields with the provided values.

      A field is only changed when the supplied value is non-null and non-blank.

      Parameters:
      displayName - the new display name (ignored if blank)
      currency - the new preferred currency (ignored if blank)
      language - the new preferred language (ignored if blank)

    • changeCurrency

      public void changeCurrency(String currency)
      Changes the preferred currency for this profile.
      Parameters:
      currency - the new currency code (e.g., "USD")

    • changeLanguage

      public void changeLanguage(String language)
      Changes the preferred language for this profile.
      Parameters:
      language - the new language name (e.g., "Arabic")

    • verifyCredentials

      public boolean verifyCredentials(String email, String password)
      Verifies that both email and password are non-blank.

      Used as a lightweight pre-check before delegating to User.login(String, String).

      Parameters:
      email - the email address to check
      password - the password to check
      Returns:
      true if both values are non-null and non-blank

    • getProfile

      public String getProfile()
      Returns a formatted string representation of this profile.
      Returns:
      a multi-line string showing name, currency, language, and picture

    • exportData

      public String exportData()
      Returns a string representation of this profile suitable for data export.
      Returns:
      a formatted export string

    • getUserID

      public int getUserID()
      Returns:
      the user ID associated with this profile

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Returns:
      the display name

    • getCurrency

      public String getCurrency()
      Returns:
      the preferred currency code

    • getLanguage

      public String getLanguage()
      Returns:
      the preferred language

    • getProfilePicture

      public String getProfilePicture()
      Returns:
      the profile picture path or URL; empty string if none

    • setDisplayName

      public void setDisplayName(String n)
      Parameters:
      n - the new display name

    • setCurrency

      public void setCurrency(String c)
      Parameters:
      c - the new currency code

    • setLanguage

      public void setLanguage(String l)
      Parameters:
      l - the new language name

    • setProfilePicture

      public void setProfilePicture(String p)
      Parameters:
      p - the new profile picture value
